form.formComment: Is making a debut in a jumps race. Two back raced on the pace prior to fading finished tenth of 12 starters at Lingfield All Weather on March 25 over 2400m, 12 len behind Dotties Star carrying 61kg at $13 and last start finished fifth of 10 runners at Wolverhampton on April 6 over 2800m, 4.5 len behind V Power with 55kg at $34. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran too free and hung right-handed.

form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last start finished fourth of 9 starters at Pontefract on April 7 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Sailthisshipalone carrying 59.5kg at $12. The start before that; finished third of 9 starters at Southwell All Weather on April 2 over 2200m, 0.5 len behind Hackney Diamonds carrying 60kg at $7. Continues to improve. Looks well placed here and gets his chance to win again.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months pulled up at Kelso on March 21 over 3200m. Rates highly in this field and worth another chance.
